mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_code, entity_name, entity_type, physical_table, primary_key, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_entity WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, entity_code, entity_name, entity_type, physical_table, primary_key, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_entity WHERE entity_code = #{entityCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, entity_code, entity_name, entity_type, physical_table, primary_key, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_entity WHERE is_deleted = false AND entity_code IN #{code}
